ha6c3072bgfb9eg4b0bg82e9g6b47a625656f: Take one. Dragon's Breath brandy - puts hair on your bones.
h175369c9gf0bag49e2g9ba3gbaf70437f484: Grab a flagon and take a swig.
hb6db592fgb94fg45f0ga60bg92810d825671: My bones are fine as they are. You should take it easy.
h8b1e259bgda58g450cg938dg9a98afd5677b: Trust me. I'm taking it real easy.
h390275f7ga4f4g4831gbf84gc3d11d0e78a9: Not yet, but I'm working on it.
hc84dc712g2ba1g47f0gafafg025b8daa469a: You were right back there - at the windmill, I mean. I lost my head.
heeafc3c8g249cg4877g95dcg5199a1aeea3d: Do you know what it's like? For your life to belong to another?
heff4908cgcf37g4f5fgac20g39b2f3d3a226: Imagine a devil watching your every step, hearing your every word.
hc83e9e0dg7ce3g4d80ga3d4g06c6852b6e69: Now imagine you got a chance to be free. Not a soul would refuse it.
h916a223ege939g45acga4acg06f7187db16e: Mm. You better take another sip of that brandy.
h07f30c79ge46cg49efgb3dbg506e539a2ff8: I don't need Mizora. I'm the godsdamned Blade of Frontiers.
h077f2565gdc9fg4fb1g9279g1cf79e4c36a6: I will break these chains. And I will be my own man.
h263415c4g9f21g4528g9406g050e2bde95c1: Sounds noble. And likely impossible. But I'll be there to help, all the same.
hbd1e59cbg6513g4f46g9460g8a63e8f71846: To friendship, then. May some ties be everlasting.
he222955cg65f2g4850gb310g3e0ab161d6f6: Mizora made you a hero. You sure you want to see what things'll be like without her?
ha105e1a3g4a32g4bccg99ecgeaa253d764e2: Mizora made me a puppet. I made me a hero.
hff159b47g7447g4c9ag8e6cg74655faec702: And I'm less than nothing if I don't shake her free.
h86f831d6g76d4g4728ga8f7g918b15e540cc: Biding your time, eh? Admit it - you're never breaking free of her.
hd7c600a1g39f7g416agbb4dgc98d6a5df9ec: We've been infected with brain worms and dropped from the skies. Is breaking this pact so absurd?
h14800d52g8a88g40ffgaac6gd4d535c66ce0: If Mizora wants my help to free her, she sure as the Nine Hells better pay me in kind.
h89497024g3c99g491eg8f2fg224a68b1102a: You sure you don't want a swig? You won't taste better.
ha02b8efege487g4d89gbd1cg55e18f941fba: Take the flagon and have a sip.
h1167f183g1393g4fbcg8f6fgab957c60dc0f: You are easily tempted by cloying promises.
h3bd1917dg3c6eg4bc8gac7fg39838068f2fa: That was the old me. Now? Now I'm the godsdamned Blade of Frontiers.
h61805ca8g8e48g4343gb63bg878fa37caa04: There's been times in my life when I was not in control.
hcfb6e8e7g7d87g4b8dg9ecbg73bd2ab377bc: You have lost control. But have you lost your self?
h6a601efcg14efg459bg8026g0ab31724d6c6: Think of Shar and all you've done for her, before saying you know all too well.
h1bc19016g2f89g478fg86afg4f08d7357928: I took freedom as fact till Mizora stripped it away.
h0a83bb6dgf2c2g44c1g9df3g3a53abe2b588: Reckoned I could regain it till the first time I tried breaking free.
h652b75deg1f4dg4f9bgabeega14ece74d8a1: She slid her tongue down my cheek and kissed away my last breath. She made me beg to stay in her arms.
h83232f88gcc00g4d2egaf4eg25660a919051: |Karlach - for too long was my life not my own|
hb363c38cgf9fcg4173gb5acg8c589d477eab: Try not to shudder and say you know all too well.
h64d1cd03g0474g4d22g966dgff86194be761: Indeed. What purpose a life that isn't dedicated to something?
ha6201a15gecbcg4d53gb3d6gd27c0b80a153: A servant by choice, then. How charitable of you.
hfb1f71dbg5cfdg4ff7gb0d0g500640fbce86: Reckoned I had a choice, too - till I first tried to break free.
hb900e68dgd36bg4728gacbag918d58fe3132: I belong to Lolth, body and soul.
h18b0ab26g8c12g43a9g9a91g9385c386c033: I belong to Vlaakith, body and soul.
h8ca3f0e4g5d49g4283g892eg24fb8bb3c1f6: I do not know such possession, only the bonds of the clan.
hbaac7156g531eg4e21ga982g03e427d2b823: You know dedication. But you do not know possession.
hb6405f52gaa2bg4a98gad26gc54c26fb6f5f: Yes. My power depends solely on my patron's goodwill.
h9bbe6335g0416g452cgba04gf2cd70810f66: Heh - freedom. It's always just on the horizon.
h030bf363g5f15g4214gbbeagbda7df38ee58: Reckoned it was in reach till the first time I pursued it.
hd43adf66gaed7g4b85gb080g56cc55e38fb0: I do not 'belong' to my patron. I act only of my own accord.
hb8d4c0dbgfbbfg46b3gbf2dg05667c443854: I doubt your god sees much difference.
hd83ccc0dg9c38g42ecg812dgc6ddb3ec9ca8: My deity is my master, and I am a willing servant.
h59b95924g3ab0g4bdbgb261gd0ba2971f0b9: Ah, yes - how often have I told myself that I'd entered a pact by choice?
h2887216cg9568g484cgbff9g68532e6cb738: How often have I tried to break free, only for her lips to graze my skin and promise still more?
h62b39f2dg5fa4g4f74g858bg29c9390df62c: You're a warlock. You must know what it's like, for your life to belong to another.
he3586b84gf86eg4162gb463g00c5c133e5fc: You ever felt so much hate, it poisoned your blood?
h786b2fabgba62g415cgae19g39480adb1b24: Then you've known the sickness that spreads through me.
h93e5e224g61a7g4680ga242g3cbce1d64b92: I crossed paths with Spike a few years back. He'd torched a whole village - left it to burn.
h65d00151gc7d7g4f03gb864g46f5e0ad7e60: I wasn't the Blade then. Just a kid, really.
h2f2d179bge268g4ec2g9b41g67906f9d8b23: Should've known better than to run hollering after a goblin bruiser on a rage-high.
h10d1b0afgd2cbg4db2gbbd8gad7cdf2d180a: Mm. You better take another sip of that brandy.
had394b04g9485g492agac51g00a6b0fae785: Spike went right for the eye. Last thing I saw was the dagger coming at me.
h901f12e8gb882g4bf5g8759g5e74f867d4a6: Woke in a puddle of piss and blood. I reckon he thought I was dead.
h54dc953dgbf7dg43d9gbcf0gdb8ee492cb83: I wasn't dead. From anger and sorrow, I was reborn. I was the Blade of Frontiers.
h30366b3fg8fcbg4aaag8290g13f7ab9a9327: I will have Spike's head. I will see the land cleansed. And I will keep its people safe.
h3a93a800g75f3g4ab4ga153gaa9bbbdba633: If Spike wants redemption, he'll only find it in the Blade.
he90041dagfcfag4f11gae45ga2120cb1710d: The goblins are a scourge. Let us be rid of them all.
h6cb060d7gd289g4636ga375gd3d6b85b46d9: Death to all goblins? I'll drink to that.
h45ad3a46g9de3g465bg8a2dg4979a2e1f889: A revenge quest? I wouldn't miss it for the world.
h5e417049gca94g4583gba67g69562173e90f: You hear that Spike? The Blade's comin' for you - and he won't be alone.
h3ba1de59g85bcg4e72g8e98ge213849fcc43: You lost your eye to a goblin? That's hilarious.
h62467ca8g82e7g4643gb1e2gb636bc8c2cc7: Scoff all you want. Vengeance is the best punchline.
h9545fcfegca6bg45e0g8176ge714d356e9d6: I will see Spike dead. I will see the land cleansed. And I will keep its people safe.
h1cb7ba72g70a8g4478gb1f8gbd86c0e247e5: You sure you don't want a swig? You won't taste better.
hdd68edb4g26e3g452fgb7c6g4fa53cf1b029: Take the flagon and have a sip.
h790521afg1263g49f9gb83fga4ceeff2333c: I've held a grudge or two. None of them ever ran that deep though.
h450df288gb589g497cg875fgaee94a265f55: Then you don't know the sickness that spreads through me.
ha2d2ccdfgfc79g4922gbdd0g4f77e9952cc4: Me? Never - I know only love.
h14c76be1g1074g489fg9ef5g21138e831547: Indiscriminate love? A beautiful lie. You cannot know love if you have not felt the lack of it.
ha0422404g373fg4bbcg9b9bg8bbe24562faa: You clearly have. An unfortunate attitude for a 'legendary hero.'
h9eaa8286gc17cg44c9g9954g76e448cbb13b: On the contrary - being a good hero means knowing exactly who you should hate.
h805c3e04g28d5g4cf8ga3feg9fce54b47c66: Then you know the sickness that spreads through me.
h5356379fg7736g4f74g823bgf0c479bb5bbb: I have been known to lose my temper.
h8c58ecc6gce0bg4c0agb7d0gb1ebbf6a2c7c: |Karlach - despite everything, I believe everyone can be redeemed|
h9f824a58g47bdg4c4ag98aag8eb6a3905a2b: Redemption is not mine to give - it is the sinner's to earn.
ha76f0514g4bdfg488cgaa94g49e1f2a88e4e: I reserve such loathing for the enemies of my Queen, as was my teaching.
hebcc9fdcg1204g4cefgbdb8g228fbdcaa9b6: I'll try to avoid earning her ire, then.
h09c80e85g571ag4d6bg8693gae5e26567d20: I reserve such loathing for Lolth's enemies.
h749b2bfcg6964g481ag950cg9b83b28b6776: I hate Moradin. It was he who cast the duergar into darkness.
h0b7417bag7cdeg4760g9678g30efd6e77a7b: Yes - the shield dwarves who abandoned my people so long ago.
hc92e1087g1973g496ag8fefg9a0ff2d521d3: You were right - you did me a favour back at the windmill. The roach deserved what he got.
h1fda8626g6cf8g4e1ag84c6gab1dfaf20e8e: You were wrong, you know - back at the windmill. Letting that cockroach go.
h90c2927cg1a75g4dffg990eg787542c0b892: Sorry about all that - back at the windmill, I mean. I lost my head.
he1d072ccg51dcg46d4ga77eg49f8a5982e4c: Dragon's Breath? That stuff's wicked - can't even stand to smell it.
h6c6028d0g3471g4f1bgad95g92c639c3c078: Strong as a stag's sweat, and twice as tasty.
h5e2021c3g078bg49f9g9843g45d023b6541f: Dragon's Breath? Clever. Quite potent, I presume.
